name: The Citizens National Bank Of Mcconnelsville
description_short: Citizens National Bank of McConnelsville is a community bank offering checking, savings, CDs, online banking, mobile banking, and identity theft protection services.
description_long:
Citizens National Bank of McConnelsville (CNB) operates as a traditional community bank serving customers through digital and in-person banking channels. The bank maintains an active web presence at cnbmoco.com and provides core banking services designed for both individual and business customers.

The bank's service offerings include checking accounts (including new business checking options), savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), home equity lines of credit (HELOC), mobile banking, online banking, and identity theft protection through a partnership with Kroll Fraud Solutions. Their ID TheftSmart service is available in multiple tiers, ranging from basic consultation and restoration at $2.99/month to enhanced monitoring packages with Dark Web scanning capabilities. The bank emphasizes security features, digital accessibility, and customer transition support for those switching banks.

CNB distinguishes itself through its partnership with Kroll Fraud Solutions for comprehensive identity theft services, offering tiered protection options rather than a one-size-fits-all approach. The bank specifically targets small business customers with tailored checking account options and promotes its BaZing-powered checking account for both domestic and international use. Their marketing emphasizes ease of account switching with dedicated Universal Bankers to guide customers through the transition process.

As a community bank, CNB's primary strength lies in personalized service and local relationships. However, the website content provided offers limited information about competitive rates, fee structures, minimum balance requirements, or specific loan terms. The identity theft protection partnership is a notable value-add, but full service details beyond the basic tier descriptions are incomplete on the available pages. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Business checking accounts (three tailored options for different business sizes)
Personal checking accounts with BaZing benefits
ID TheftSmart idINTEGRITY Scan with Dark Web monitoring
Account switching assistance through Universal Bankers
Identity theft consultation and guidance services
pros: Offers tiered ID TheftSmart identity theft protection starting at $2.99/month with licensed investigators for full restoration service
Partnership with Kroll Fraud Solutions provides professional identity theft investigation and restoration if fraud occurs
Three tailored business checking account options for businesses of different sizes
Mobile banking app available for account management on-the-go
BaZing-powered checking accounts support domestic and international shopping
Home Equity Lines of Credit (HELOC) for home improvement financing
Dedicated Universal Bankers to assist customers switching from other banks
Online banking with video tutorials for customer support
cons: Website content does not disclose APY rates, account fees, or minimum balance requirements
Limited geographic information available; unclear service area or number of physical locations
ID TheftSmart service details incomplete on website (idINTEGRITY Scan description cuts off mid-sentence)
No information about loan products, mortgage offerings, or business lending terms
Marketing-heavy homepage with limited functional product comparison or transparent pricing
best_for: Small business owners seeking tailored business checking options with local bank relationships
Consumers concerned about identity theft who want professional restoration services at low cost
Existing customers of other banks looking to switch with personalized transition support
Customers seeking bundled banking services including CDs and home equity financing
diagnosis: Citizens National Bank of McConnelsville is best for small business owners and individual customers seeking personalized community bank services with emphasis on identity theft protection. The main caveat is that the website lacks transparent pricing, rate information, and complete service details, requiring direct contact with the bank to compare competitiveness and understand full product features.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
